creator: ArthurD@datasunrise.com
text: DataSunrise solves the compliance problem for organizations fighting against privacy and security incidents. DataSunrise data-centric security software protects databases against both external and internal threats, providing with real-time traffic and event monitoring, database firewall, data audit, data masking and deep SQL queries behavioral analysis. Supports all databases and datawarehouses including Oracle, Db2, Redshift, aurora, MSSQL, MySQL, Teradata and more. DataSunrise can be easily integrated with third-party security solutions such as SIEM systems. More details at datasunrise.com and free evaluation trial.
